name: Gem Legends
description: Gem Legends is an exciting and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you match colorful gems, create powerful combos, and unlock legendary treasures! Swap and match 3 or more gems to blast them and clear levels. Create special gem combinations to trigger explosive effects and score big! With hundreds of challenging levels, smooth gameplay, and stunning visuals, Gem Legends will keep you hooked for hours!
instructions: Mouse Touch Swap gems Drag Move gem to match Tap Select amp swap Match 3 Clear gems Match 4 5 Create special power gems
